{{CargoRelic
|name=Bladden's Head
|class_id=20240
|rank=Green
|affct=FTH
|source=Defeat [[Yamato Domain|Bladden]]
|description=This head with a samurai helmet once belonged to Sword God, one of the eight Demon Gods. He was a sword master who never lost any battle except for the one with the snail. His head then became part of the snail's collection.
|fame=17
|art=14
|fth=31
|civ=14
|tech=14
|ss1=Snail HP +200<br>Per Demon God slain, Snail ATK +10<br>Demon Gods Slain: 8/8
|ss2=Snail HP +400<br>Per Demon God slain, Snail ATK +20<br>Demon Gods Slain: 8/8
|ss3=Snail HP +600<br>Per Demon God slain, Snail ATK +30<br>Demon Gods Slain: 8/8
}}

[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Demon God Boost]]
[[Category:HP Boost]]
